hexes.label: Fevergold Tempest
hexes.description: Golden lightning forks through a sky thick with glittering spores. The wind howls and the air itself seems to burn with fever.
hexes.effectNote: Disadvantage on ranged attacks and Perception; anyone unmasked risks the gold-sickness (DC scales with exposure).

hexes.label: Searing Haze
hexes.description: The horizon melts into a shimmering wall of heat, the world gilded and wavering.
hexes.effectNote: Exertion risks heat exhaustion; metal and stone grow too hot to touch.

hexes.label: Gilded Squall
hexes.description: Warm, amber-tinted rain drives in sheets, slicking everything in a thin gold film.
hexes.effectNote: Tracks wash out quickly; footing on gilded stone is treacherous.

hexes.label: Sporestorm
hexes.description: Clouds of luminous fevergold spores boil up from the marsh, blotting out the sun.
hexes.effectNote: Breathing unfiltered air carries the gold-sickness; visibility drops to a few yards.

hexes.label: Goldwind
hexes.description: A hot, gritty gale carries a stinging haze of golden dust off the dunes.
hexes.effectNote: Cover the eyes and mouth; ranged attacks suffer in the driving grit.

hexes.label: Cinder Rush
hexes.description: Glowing embers ride the hot wind, kindling the dry gold grass wherever they settle.
hexes.effectNote: Dry terrain may ignite; open flame and oil are hazardous.

hexes.label: Fever Haze
hexes.description: A sickly low haze the colour of old gold clings to the ground, sweet and cloying.
hexes.effectNote: Lingering long without a mask risks a mild fever.

hexes.label: Golden Rain
hexes.description: Warm amber rain falls steadily, beading like honey on leaf and cloak.

hexes.label: Pollen Drift
hexes.description: Gold pollen drifts lazily on the warm air, catching the light like flecks of leaf-metal.

hexes.label: Gilt Fog
hexes.description: A thick, glimmering fog rolls in, every droplet gilded by some unseen light.
hexes.effectNote: Visibility reduced; easy to lose the trail.

hexes.label: Warm Murk
hexes.description: A soft golden overcast smothers the sky in warm, hazy light.

hexes.label: Amber Drizzle
hexes.description: A fine amber drizzle settles over everything, more mist than rain.

hexes.label: Goldlight
hexes.description: Hazy golden sun pours down, motes of gilded dust turning slowly in the beams.

hexes.label: Dust of Gold
hexes.description: A light, dry breeze lifts fine gold dust that glitters as it drifts past.

hexes.label: Glimmer Mist
hexes.description: A faint, shimmering mist hangs in the air, catching glints of gold with every breath of wind.

hexes.label: Soft Gold Sky
hexes.description: Gentle warm skies, gilded at the edges, with only the lightest haze.

hexes.label: Gilded Stillness
hexes.description: Warm, golden, and utterly calm — the baseline hush of Fevergold, beautiful and deceptive.

hexes.label: Honeyed Air
hexes.description: The air goes sweet and still, faint gold motes hanging suspended as if the world is holding its breath.

hexes.label: Aurelian Bloom
hexes.description: A freak hush, and the air fills with drifting glyphs of golden light — beautiful, soundless, and wrong. The old folk call it an omen of the fever deepening.
hexes.effectNote: GM: an omen. Consider deepening any active fever/corruption track or foreshadowing a Fevergold event.
